title: BEM-841 concrete next
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 10:15 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem840_execute_after_bem839_status.json')
status_in=prev.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if status_in=='triad_present_process_protocol_next':
    status='protocol_processing_selected'
    next_action='build agreed protocol from real Claude response'
elif status_in=='dispatch_and_runtime_ok_response_missing':
    prompt=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem841_request_real_claude_response.md')
    prompt.write_text('# BEM-841 | REQUEST REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: provide real response for multi-agent architecture strategy agreement. Include exact line `CLAUDE RESPONSE` and `Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED`. Do not write issue comments. Write to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem841_claude_response.md.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_response_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 request real Claude response after dispatch/runtime proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(prompt),str(q)])
    status='queued_real_response_retry'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
elif status_in=='dispatch_result_ok_runtime_missing':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_runtime_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 repair Claude runtime state missing','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='queued_runtime_repair_dispatch'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
elif status_in=='dispatch_results_missing':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_self_dispatch_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 repair dispatch result writer missing','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='queued_dispatch_result_probe'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify workflow_dispatch_results'
else:
    status='unknown_bem840_status_recorded'
    next_action='inspect BEM-840 state before further code changes'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'bem840_status':status_in,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_execute_concrete_next_after_bem840.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_execute_concrete_next_after_bem840.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Execute Concrete Next After BEM-840 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem841_execute_concrete_next_after_bem840.json','governance/reports/bem841_execute_concrete_next_after_bem840.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed concrete next action after BEM-840: process protocol if triad exists or queue a targeted dispatch/prompt for the first missing proof')
"""
No issue comments.
